metadata.description: A curated collection of Claude Code plugins

plugins.name: devenv
plugins.description: Initialize and manage Nix flake development environments with auto-detection and security tooling

plugins.name: git-commit
plugins.description: Generate intelligent git commit messages with classic or conventional commit style support, strict atomic commit validation, and session context awareness

plugins.name: jot
plugins.description: Quick, low-friction capture of notes, tasks, ideas, session summaries, tech radar blips, and Feynman-style teaching notes with Obsidian-style auto-linking

plugins.name: sketch-note
plugins.description: Generate visual sketch notes in Excalidraw format from conversations, code architecture, or custom content

plugins.name: typst-notes
plugins.description: Generate beautiful PDF/HTML shareable notes using Typst with 7 professional templates, infographics, and modern typography

plugins.name: task-decomposer
plugins.description: Transform complex tasks into structured beads issues using configurable decomposition frameworks (built-in, superpowers, speckit, bmad) with proper dependencies

plugins.name: task-executor
plugins.description: Execute decomposed beads tasks using framework-adaptive subagents with batch processing, dual-stage review, and atomic commits

plugins.name: guardrails
plugins.description: Efficiency guardrails for Claude - IDE refactoring handoff with automatic pattern detection, extensible to security, cost, and testing patterns

plugins.name: clean-merge
plugins.description: Commit review, regrouping, and validation for clean git history — standalone or as part of branch merge workflows

plugins.name: codebase
plugins.description: Intelligent codebase exploration powered by codebase-memory-mcp. Natural language queries, change impact analysis, symbol graph traversal, and automatic brainstorming/planning integration.

plugins.name: refactor
plugins.description: Semantic refactoring opportunity detection. Scans committed code for structural duplication (Fowler catalog), code smells (Fowler/Beck), GoF design pattern opportunities, SOLID/DRY principle violations, and language-idiomatic anti-patterns (Go, Python, TypeScript). Creates beads issues with TDD-first refactoring plans. Hooks into task-executor after each task closes.
